page: Microsoft Azure E64s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine configured with 64 vCPUs and 432.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz, this x86_64 architecture server features 32 physical cores with Hyper-Threading enabled, providing dedicated CPU allocation. The processor includes a 35 MB L3 cache and supports AVX, AVX512F, and AES hardware instructions. It is equipped with 885 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include a GPU or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff between single-core and multi-threaded operations. The server exhibits weak single-core CPU performance, as demonstrated by stress-ng single-core, gzip compression, and Geekbench single-core scores falling in the bottom 25%. Conversely, multi-threaded capabilities are robust, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression and Passmark CPU extended instructions testing in the top 25%. Memory performance is highly capable, showing strong uncached read and write bandwidth for large blocks, while small-block cached read bandwidth and overall Passmark memory scores remain in the middle 50%.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 6.75 GB per core and strong multi-threaded decompression and large-block memory bandwidth, this server is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is well-positioned for database operations, Redis deployments, and multi-threaded data processing tasks. The dedicated CPU allocation and high resource density provide a stable environment for enterprise applications, though workloads requiring high single-thread execution speeds may experience bottlenecks due to the lower single-core benchmark results.
description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine featuring 64 vCPUs and 432.0 GB of RAM, running on an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor at 2.6 GHz. This x86_64 server provides 32 physical cores with dedicated CPU allocation, a 35 MB L3 cache, and 885 GB of local storage. Benchmark results reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression are weak, whereas multi-threaded decompression and large-block memory read/write bandwidth are strong. Average performance is observed in database operations, Redis SET transactions, and static web serving. With its high memory capacity and robust multi-core execution, the E64s_v3 is suited for memory-intensive enterprise applications, database hosting, and parallel data processing workloads where single-thread latency is not the primary constraint.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine featuring 64 vCPUs, 432 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor. It offers strong multi-threaded performance and large-block memory bandwidth.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v3 is an ESv3 virtual machine with 64 vCPUs, 432 GB RAM, and 885 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four vCPUs, dedicated Intel Xeon hardware, and strong multi-threaded data processing capabilities.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 64 vCPUs and 32 physical cores
432.0 GB of RAM and 885 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong multi-threaded decompression and large-block memory read/write bandwidth
Weak single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance
Suited for database hosting, Redis deployments, and parallel data processing
